themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Cross references echo "Kingdom". Word-study detail reinforces "מֶ֖לֶךְ: Now these are the kings - a king".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 43 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: מֶ֖לֶךְ: Now these are the kings - a king

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 44 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ: reigned - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 45 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיִּמְלֹ֣ךְ: reigned - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 46 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: וַיִּמְלֹ֨ךְ: reigned - to reign; hence (by implication) to take counsel

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֔רֶץ: the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 10 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: בָּאָֽרֶץ׃: upon the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 19 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: הָאָ֔רֶץ: the earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
